title: A Rigorous Functional-Integral Construction of Toral Chern-Simons Theory
summary: We construct the functional integral of Abelian Chern-Simons theory with toral gauge group $\mathbb T=\mathfrak t/Λ\cong U(1)^n$ at level $K$, where $K:Λ\timesΛ\to\mathbb Z$ is an even, integral, nondegenerate symmetric bilinear form, by exact zeta-regularized Gaussian evaluation of the formal quotient integral over connections modulo gauge. For closed $3$-manifolds, this yields a topological invariant; for manifolds with boundary, the relative functional integral produces the canonical boundary state. The resulting theory satisfies the required axioms of a $(2+1)$-dimensional TQFT.

AI.tldr: 构建了具有环面规范群U(1)^n的Abelian Chern-Simons理论的泛函积分，通过zeta正则化高斯积分精确计算，得到拓扑不变量和边界态
AI.motivation: 为Abelian Chern-Simons理论建立严格的泛函积分表述，特别是对于环面规范群的情况，解决形式商积分在模规范变换下的计算问题
AI.method: 使用zeta正则化的高斯积分方法精确计算形式商积分，其中规范群是环面T = t/Λ ≅ U(1)^n，水平K是偶、整数、非退化的对称双线性形式
AI.result: 对于闭3-流形得到拓扑不变量；对于带边界的流形得到规范边界态；理论满足(2+1)维拓扑量子场论的所有公理
AI.conclusion: 成功构建了Abelian Chern-Simons理论的严格泛函积分表述，建立了完整的(2+1)维TQFT框架，为相关拓扑量子场论研究提供了数学基础
